summary: Average show with a great jam before drums, but the soundboard recording suffers from noticeable phase problems.
review: The performance is described as fairly average overall, highlighted only by an impressive jam leading into the drum solo. The source appears to be a soundboard (SBD), which generally sounds good, yet reviewers note that the tape is out of phase, detracting from the listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Limited feedback (only two brief reviews) shows a middling show (≈3/5) and recording issues (phase problems ≈2.5/5); weighted average yields ~2.9.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally decent SBD source, but listeners report the audio is out of phase, causing muddiness and reduced clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall an average set with a notable jam right before the drums; no specific song issues mentioned.
